nodes.label: Singleton Pattern
nodes.rationale: All component classes use get_instance() classmethod for singleton instantiation, ensuring single instances throughout application lifecycle. This provides consistent state management and reduces memory overhead.

nodes.label: DTO Immutability Pattern
nodes.rationale: DTOs use frozen=True and slots=True dataclass decorators to ensure immutability and memory efficiency. Prevents accidental state mutation in data transfer objects flowing through application layers.
